weeklyCadence.label: Weekly Pack Refresh
weeklyCadence.rule: Every pack must be rebuilt weekly from latest-public-drops, live-intel, intel-vault, source files, book routes, and filtered forum exports. Active news links must stay source-labelled and expired links must move to the vault.

title: Crime-State Overlap Pack
label: Crime / corruption pack
summary: A briefing pack for cartels, mafia logistics, sanctions, court records, ports, laundering, banks, shell companies, and corruption overlap.
weeklyMission: Track the public-record overlap between crime networks, logistics, finance, sanctions, public contracts, port corridors, and institutional failure.
brandLine: Follow logistics and money. Street violence is only the visible surface.
boundary: A dossier pack is an orientation bundle. It does not prove guilt, causation, intent, control, or criminal conduct.
contentAngles: Which crime dossier explains the system?

takeaways: Sanctions indicate government designation, not automatic conviction.
Logistics and finance explain more than street violence.
The reader path moves from map to books to evidence lanes.
Corruption is a system of permissions, blind spots, and incentives.
